Amari is absolutely incredible. She made me feel so comfortable and the tattoo is better than I imagined.

Hey, you made it! Welcome. I'm Amari, a tattoo artist based out of United Tattoo in Fountain, Colorado. I specialize in American traditional: bold lines, saturated color, and timeless imagery that hits deep. I fell in love with this style because it's honest—it holds history, and it holds up on the skin and in the heart.

I actually started out in black & grey, and it still means a lot to me. It taught me how to slow down, how to see softness in the details, and how to work with intention. Even though traditional is where my soul lives now, I still carry that beginning with me and I love returning to it when it feels right for the piece.

### Artistic Style

My work centers around classic American traditional, but I love exploring different approaches:
- Bold lines and saturated color
- Timeless traditional imagery
- Black & grey with soft details and intention
- Rotating flash collection (check the portfolio!)
- Custom pieces that feel uniquely yours

Flash lovers, this one's for you—I've got a rotating collection of available flash designs ready to find a home. All flash is repeatable unless noted otherwise, and I'm always down to adjust sizing or color.

### Philosophy

Tattooing feels like a quiet kind of magic. It's deeply personal and bigger than just art—it's trust, storytelling, and shared space. My goal is always to make something that feels like you, while still staying true to my style. Something real. Something that'll last.

> "thank you so much for being here. i hope i get to tattoo you soon. ✧ amari ✧"

## About Christy

Christy Lumberg is a resident artist at United Tattoo, specializing in fine line work, botanical designs, and geometric patterns. Her delicate approach to tattooing creates elegant, timeless pieces.

### Style & Approach

With a keen eye for detail and a steady hand, Christy excels at creating intricate designs that flow naturally with the body's contours. Her botanical work captures the beauty of nature in stunning detail.

### Booking

Christy is currently accepting new clients for custom fine line and botanical work. Please include reference images with your booking request.

Originating from the Lone Star State, Donovan Lankford brings his exceptional artistry to United Tattoo in Fountain, Colorado. Renowned for his talent in crafting captivating works of art on skin, Donovan's passion and creativity shine through every piece.

### Artistic Style

Donovan's artistry seamlessly merges bold blackwork with intricate illustrative details, showcasing his expertise across various styles:
- Realism and portrait work
- Black and grey illustrative
- Anime and manga characters
- Dotwork and geometric designs

With an unwavering love for the expressive worlds of anime and manga, Donovan infuses vitality into beloved characters, bringing them to life on skin.

### Philosophy

Entering Donovan's realm invites you to embrace creativity and self-expression. Whether you seek to immortalize your favorite anime figure, indulge in striking blackwork, or grace your skin with floral elegance, Donovan views tattooing as more than a mere art form—it's an unforgettable journey.

> "This is my career, and I'm incredibly proud to be a tattoo artist."

Meet the one and only John "Spray Day" Lapides. Although originating from Southern California, John has done his fair share of traveling the world learning from all sorts of cultures. Spending the last few years strengthening his craft at United Tattoo in Fountain, Colorado, this is where he's really found his style.

### Artistic Style

John has a well-rounded skill set, allowing him to thrive in almost any kind of work, but he particularly enjoys and excels with:
- Illustrated blackwork
- Geometric patterns
- Floral designs
- Patchwork style sleeves
- Traditional and Japanese work

His crisp and clean fine lines mixed with striking stylized blackwork make his work truly distinguishable and more than ordinary.

### Experience & Recognition

As a featured artist in various tattoo magazines and published by highly regarded news channels, John has over six years of experience under his belt. His dedication to the craft and unique artistic vision have earned him recognition across the tattoo community.

## About Pako

Pako Martinez is a vibrant force at United Tattoo, known for bold neo-traditional work and stunning use of color. His illustrative style brings a unique energy to every piece.

### Style & Approach

Pako's work is characterized by dynamic compositions, rich color palettes, and a playful yet refined aesthetic. He excels at transforming ideas into eye-catching, wearable art.

### Booking

Pako is currently accepting new clients. For best results, bring reference images that capture the mood and style you're looking for.

Known professionally as "Sole," Steven Cedre brings vibrant energy and masterful technique to United Tattoo in Fountain, Colorado. With a distinctive signature style that merges photorealistic detail with bold cartoon aesthetics, Sole has carved out a unique niche in the tattoo world where technical precision meets playful creativity. ### Artistic Style Sole specializes in bringing imagination to life through two powerful approaches: - Color realism with rich, vibrant palettes - Cartoon and animated character work - Pop culture and media-inspired designs - Dynamic compositions with bold visual impact - Custom collaborative pieces His work is characterized by crisp linework, stunning color saturation, and the ability to capture both the photographic realism of portraits and the exaggerated expressiveness of cartoon art. Whether you're looking to immortalize a beloved character or create a vivid, lifelike portrait, Sole's versatility ensures your vision comes to life with exceptional detail. ### Creative Philosophy Sole approaches each tattoo as a unique collaboration between artist and client. His goal is to create pieces that not only look incredible on day one, but become cherished, permanent art that tells your story. With a keen eye for color theory and composition, Sole transforms skin into a canvas where realism and imagination coexist in perfect harmony. > "Every tattoo is a chance to create something that's never been done before—something uniquely yours."
